description: Analyse the planning documents in prd.md and produce docs/TASKS.md and docs/TASK_GRAPH.json.

userStories.title: Create docs/TASKS.md
userStories.description: As a developer, I need docs/TASKS.md containing a dependency-ordered markdown checkbox task list.
acceptanceCriteria: File contains at least one checkbox task in '- [ ] ...' format

userStories.title: Create docs/TASK_GRAPH.json
userStories.description: As a developer, I need docs/TASK_GRAPH.json containing valid JSON with id, description, depends_on, status, files_affected, and completed_at for every task.
acceptanceCriteria: File contains valid JSON with a 'tasks' array
